sections.paragraph:
ϑησαυρός, οῦ, ὁ [orig. uncertain and apparently primitive]

—1. ‘place for safekeeping’, container, chest Mt 2:11; storeroom 13:52. In imagery, 12:35; Lk 6:45.

—2. ‘that which is stored in a safe place’, treasure, whether material or what transcends the earthly Mt 6:19f; 13:44; 19:21; 2 Cor 4:7; Col 2:3; Hb 11:26.
